notes: Context only. No live trade gate uses this file yet.
Basic mode uses listed contracts only; it cannot see OI, IV, greeks, quotes, trades, or true walls.
Snapshot mode requires a Polygon/Massive options plan with snapshot/greeks/OI access.
Borrow availability still comes from IB/shortable data, not the options chain.
